tool_args.label: Victory Boulevard Transit and Safety Improvements in CB 1
tool_args.raw_text: Victory Boulevard Transit and Safety Improvements in CB 1 Bay St to Little Clove Rd

payload.project_name: Victory Boulevard Transit and Safety Improvements in CB 1
payload.description: Proposal to improve bus service and traffic safety on Victory Boulevard from Bay Street to Little Clove Road in Staten Island Community Board 1, including upgraded bus lanes, extended hours, new bus lanes, speed bumps, and bus stop accessibility upgrades.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Victory Boulevard Transit and Safety Improvements in CB 1 Bay St to Little Clove Rd

Refurbish existing bus lanes on Victory Boulevard between Bay St and Forest Av • Paint lanes red • Expand bus lane hours... Install new curbside bus lane between Forest Av and Eddy St • Install new curbside bus lane between Seneca Av and Little Clove Rd • Study 10 bus stops for accessibility upgrades
